title: Excalibur | Chalk Support
body:
# Excalibur | Chalk Support
This is an unofficial [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack for the mod [Chalk](https://modrinth.com/mod/chalk-mod). All textures have been edited to best fit within the Excalibur style.

## Credits
- [Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew) - Excalibur Author
- [mortuusars](https://modrinth.com/user/mortuusars) - Chalk Author
